caption: Entity Management
description:
Entity Management events report activity on managed entities such as users, groups, roles, policies, accounts, devices, and other organizational resources. Activities include create, read, update, delete, enable, disable, lock, unlock, membership changes, privilege assignments, policy attachments, password management, and MFA factor changes.

How to use: Set entity.type_id to identify the entity type (User, Group, Device, Policy, etc.) and populate the corresponding attribute inside entity (e.g. entity.user for users, entity.group for groups). Use entity_result the same way to capture the state after the change.

When to use this class: Use for any lifecycle or configuration change to an identity, access, or organizational entity. Do not use for identity verification (use Authentication) or session privilege elevation (use Authorize Session).
name: entity_management

5.caption: Move
5.description: Move or rename an existing managed entity.

8.caption: Enable
8.description: Enable an existing managed entity. Note: This is typically regarded as a semi-permanent, editor visible, syncable change.

9.caption: Disable
9.description: Disable an existing managed entity. Note: This is typically regarded as a semi-permanent, editor visible, syncable change.

10.caption: Activate
10.description: Activate an existing managed entity. Note: This is a typically regarded as a transient change, a change of state of the engine.

11.caption: Deactivate
11.description: Deactivate an existing managed entity. Note: This is a typically regarded as a transient change, a change of state of the engine.

16.caption: Assign Privileges
16.description: Assign privileges to a managed entity.

17.caption: Revoke Privileges
17.description: Revoke privileges from a managed entity.

18.caption: Add Member
18.description: Add a user or subgroup as a member of a group.

19.caption: Remove Member
19.description: Remove a user or subgroup as a member of a group.

20.caption: Password Change
20.description: An attempt was made to change a managed entity's password.

21.caption: Password Reset
21.description: An attempt was made to reset a managed entity's password.

22.caption: MFA Factor Enable
22.description: One or more authentication factors were enabled.

23.caption: MFA Factor Disable
23.description: One or more authentication factors were disabled.

24.caption: Attach Policy
24.description: An IAM Policy was attached to a managed entity.

25.caption: Detach Policy
25.description: An IAM Policy was detached from a managed entity.

auth_factors.description: Details about the authentication factors associated with MFA activities.

comment.description: The user provided comment about why the entity was changed.

policies.description: Details about the IAM policies associated with policy management activities.

privileges.description: List of privileges assigned to or revoked from the managed entity.

resources.description: Resources that the privileges give access to.
